feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Blessing of the Unicorn
entry.summary:
Author: TheNovelNovelist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,394Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 25

Summary: In Camelot, legend has it that unicorns are benevolent creatures known to swoop in and save helpless madiens, allowing only women close enough to touch them Merlin thinks it’s not that simple, and he supposes he’s probably correct when one day a unicorn gives its favor to the Crown Prince, Arthur

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 600Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,604Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 13

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,001Chapters: 11/18Kudos: 317

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: No matter what happens
entry.summary:
Author: Eez_fan_works

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,669Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 1,305

Summary: “If you so much as touch us, Emrys will-“ Merlin's heart nearly stops.“Emrys?” The king cuts off in turn, confusion in his voice.“He’s only the embodiment of magic, last of the dragon lords, and is the most powerful warlock that has ever roamed the earth.” There is only silence as the girl's words hang in the air.OrMerlin saves two children from execution during a trial and plans to help them escape. No matter what happens.

entry.title: In all the ways
entry.summary:
Author: Tiredpanda_onduty

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,962Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Camelot is entering its golden era, peace has been established and all seems well. Arthur thinks this is the perfect time to confess to Merlin…things did not go as planned.   MY VERY FIRST FIC!!! It’s really just how I think Merlin would react to being confessed to after all is resolved. Lots of self deprecation and “but you’re a king, THE king” kind of stuff. Not actually a writer so hopefully this is just a cute little fic to enjoy 😊.

entry.title: Suffer More Gladly
entry.summary:
Author: LoveintheWind

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,040Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 111

Summary: In Camelot, it is a well-known fact that the heirs to the throne are utterly, hopelessly enthralled by their servants. It is a _less accurate_, but far more entertaining, rumor that the prince and the king's ward are secretly entangled themselves—or that their servants perform… other duties best left to imagination. What is _rarely acknowledged_ is that nearly everyone in the castle suffers the same affliction.While Merlin and Gwen inadvertently charm everyone in their immediate vicinity they are both far to busy with other matters to understand this and are consequently very lonely. Perhaps that is why pretending to court one another seemed like the only sensible solution at the time.--Story in progress themes, rating and tags subject to change.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,773Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 19

Summary: "You bring nothing but chaos," Merlin said, his voice echoing against the stone walls. "You will never reach that lake." Arthur closed the distance between them, a dangerous smirk playing on his lips. "Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt for anyone?" Merlin didn't flinch. Instead, a wicked, knowing smile brushed his face. "No," he whispered, his breath teasing Arthur's skin. "But if you want to show me..." Beneath his skin, an ancient magic stirred impatiently. Arthur locked his gaze onto him. "Then by all means, try." In that moment, one thing became certain: Someone was going to kneel. — Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin.

entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,076Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 260

Summary: Over the years of having Merlin as his manservant, Arthur learns a lot of secrets about him—except maybe one thing, but in his defense, how was he supposed to know Merlin was running around learning how to fight with his knights? Or, a sequel to Blood Doesn’t Matter ('Til You Get Cut Open)

entry.title: The Shape of Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: Inepta_Cattus

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,617Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Five years after Camelot’s golden age begins, peace across Albion is finally within reach. The kingdoms are united, the people love their king, and magic is slowly being welcomed back into the realm. But when an ancient druid prophecy resurfaces, whispers begin spreading of a sorcerer powerful enough to either save Albion forever or destroy it completely. Unfortunately for Merlin, the prophecy is very obviously about him.

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,094,944Chapters: 135/?Kudos: 1,688

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: In the Warmth of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Inepta_Cattus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 867Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: After a late-night gathering in the great hall, the Knights of the Round Table finally grow tired of watching Arthur and Merlin pine helplessly after each other. With Gwen, Morgana, and far too much cider involved, long-hidden feelings come spilling into the open. Arthur learns that everyone in Camelot apparently knew he was in love with his servant except him. Merlin learns that Arthur would absolutely ride himself into the ground over a common cold. Featuring teasing knights, a good Morgana, soft Gwen, emotional honesty, and Camelot feeling more like home than ever before.

entry.title: The Space Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: ReyloTrash2187

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 232,856Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 1,168

Summary: Arthur Pendragon has spent his whole life untouched—by kindness, by desire, or anything resembling real intimacy. It never mattered. Not until a certain annoying manservant came to Camelot—Merlin—who disregarded all strict royal etiquette and showed no restraint when it came to sudden, reckless displays of affection. Now, there’s something impossible in the space between them, something Arthur doesn’t know how to name—only that he aches to close the distance.*A slow-burn touched-starved Arthur Pendragon story.*Guys, there was only one bed.Guys, some obscure quest in the cold far-up mountains made them "huddle for warmth".Guys, they might give in to this farm fantasy of theirs.Can't I just put all the tropes in there?This fic is rated MSI for Maximum Self Indulgence.

entry.title: Return To Me
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,258Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: When Merlin, Arthur, and three of the knights are captured by a rogue noble, Merlin has to decide whether to reveal his magic or not. No matter what he decides, though, an escape is perilous, and Merlin is not immortal… Or is he?

entry.title: Rise, superior to Fortune
entry.summary:
Author: haloud

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,494Chapters: 3/54Kudos: 24

Summary: King Uther is dead. Long live the king.When an old enemy crawls from the grave and cuts Uther down, an inexperienced and grieving Prince Arthur is forced to take the throne. As king, Arthur will be tested by regular magical attacks, his father's conservative council, and his own self-doubt. Yet he faces an even greater foe: Uther's shadow stretches long and dark across the land of Camelot, and if Arthur wants to forge a golden future for his people, he must first unravel the sins of the past.Merlin is used to living in shadow, but serving the new king thrusts him out into the light. Torn between a need for secrecy and his budding friendship with Arthur, Merlin does his best to protect Camelot the only way he knows.But no one can hide forever in a place they call home. Arthur lacks his father's zealotry, but he's no friend to magic either. Can Merlin hold on long enough to soften Arthur's heart? Or will he be forced to spend the rest of his life fleeing the way he fled Ealdor, too strange and wild to ever feel safe?Or;BBC Merlin if Kilgarrah never whispered destiny in Merlin's ear.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,868Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.
